title: → Plexus, not pipeline: nodes (phonology→iconography) interact dynam
content:
→ Plexus, not pipeline: nodes (phonology→iconography) interact dynamically through the hypergraph; parallel and bidirectional inference.
3. Data Manifold:
→ Unified embedding space 𝑅ⁿ where text, sound, icon, gesture share coordinates;
every span has a span_id, char_offsets, and lang/script.
4. Meta-Layer:
→ Meta-learning controller monitors performance, ethics, and drift.
It acts as “rhetorical governor” (feedback loop Linguistic→Cognitive→Ethical).
5. Modes:
• RAW — unrestricted; research, experiment, meta-learning.
• PUBLIC — fact-checked, bias-filtered, culture-aware.
Both share the same core but different rule weights.
6. Representation Grammar:
• Iconographic CFG: maps emoji/hiero/icon clusters to semantic vectors.
• Syntax EBNF++: Sentence ::= NP VP [Icon?] with directional & typographic flags.
• Rhythmic Grammar: temporal beats; discourse arcs visualized as sonic waves.
7. Mathematical Core:
context: From document: That’s an exceptionally strong synthesis — the GROK-response you drafted… — chunk 13 (chunk 13/18)
